channel.title: International Journal of the Sociology of Language
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Journal of the Sociology of Language

item.title: Negotiating sociolinguistic justice: turning spaces of inequality into spaces of conscientization
item.description: Article by Saana Santalahti DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijsl-2022-0114

item.title: Talking about sociolinguistic injustice: critical ethnographies towards speaker conscientization
item.description: Article by Saana Santalahti DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijsl-2023-0076

item.title: Spaces of conscientization as a bridge between inequality and contestation
item.description: Article by Saana Santalahti DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijsl-2023-0078

item.title: Voicing experiences of language surveillance to challenge social inequality
item.description: Article by Saana Santalahti DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijsl-2024-0128

item.title: Agency as doing-together: learning from fieldwork experiences
item.description: Article by Saana Santalahti DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijsl-2023-0080

item.title: Relevance and effectiveness in translation planning into minoritized languages: an evaluation of translation subsidies in the Galician publishing industry
item.description: Article by Saana Santalahti DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijsl-2023-0114

item.title: Ainu language use and display in the National Ainu Museum
item.description: Article by Saana Santalahti DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijsl-2023-0104
